name: Fairways Indoor Golf Club, INC.
address: 25000 Bass Pro Dr Suite 104, Spanish Fort, AL 36527
about: Fairways Indoor Golf Club is a state-of-the-art facility in Spanish Fort, Alabama, featuring high-definition golf simulators where players use real clubs and balls. The venue offers an experience suitable for all skill levels, with a clubhouse atmosphere that supports everything from casual practice sessions to corporate outings and tournaments. Memberships are available on a monthly basis with no required contract durations, and the facility includes a full-service bar for additional convenience and social enjoyment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 90+ golf courses, playable in any weather or time
High-definition simulators with realistic ball and club tracking
Flexible membership options with unlimited play time
Full-service bar and social atmosphere for group events
Host of member-only events like tournaments and clinics

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen, but BYOB is permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-definition simulators using high-speed, high-definition cameras to capture ball data.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are encouraged to bring their own clubs for the most authentic experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB is permitted, though the venue also offers a full-service bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers mini-games like Demolition Driving Range and welcomes families.
